headline: Skip Sunday snacks, row hard, catch your deficit
summary: Today you must overcome emotional snacking and exercise hard: you're 0.15 kg/week behind your required pace and Sundays are your danger zone.
details: Plan your meals with Huel or pre-portioned vegan food RIGHT NOW—do not leave eating to impulse on a Sunday. Get 45-60 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill this afternoon. Why today matters: you're 293 days behind at 121.1 kg; Sunday snacking has dragged your weekly loss to -0.43 kg when you need -0.58 kg. Win today, and you start catching up.
